title: nigella hispanica
intro: Nigella hispanica, also known as Spanish black cumin or black cumin, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nigella hispanica include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. Nigella hispanica can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and supplements, or used as an ingredient in culinary dishes, and its seeds can also be used as a spice.
